question: How many different doctors did I visit?
gold_answer: I visited three different doctors: a primary care physician, an ENT specialist, and a dermatologist.

validated_cards.claim: Preparation for a colonoscopy involves a special diet and bowel prep.
validated_cards.quote: You'll be asked to follow a special diet and bowel prep instructions to clean out your colon.

validated_cards.quote: After a colonoscopy, your doctor may recommend a light diet for a day or two to help your body recover.

validated_cards.claim: Nasal saline irrigation can help alleviate chronic sinusitis symptoms
validated_cards.quote: Nasal saline irrigation involves rinsing your nasal passages with a saline solution to remove mucus, allergens, and irritants.

validated_cards.claim: Frequency of saline irrigation depends on symptom severity
validated_cards.quote: The frequency of nasal saline irrigation depends on your individual needs and the severity of your symptoms.

validated_cards.claim: Using non-iodized salt is recommended for saline solution
validated_cards.quote: When it comes to choosing a salt, you'll want to use a non-iodized and pure salt.

validated_cards.claim: Fatigue is a common symptom of chronic sinusitis.
validated_cards.quote: Fatigue is a common symptom of chronic sinusitis, affecting up to 70% of patients.

validated_cards.claim: Joint pain can be a symptom of chronic sinusitis.
validated_cards.quote: Fatigue and joint pain can be symptoms of chronic sinusitis, but they can also be indicative of other underlying conditions.

validated_cards.claim: Chronic sinusitis can cause systemic inflammation leading to fatigue and joint pain.
validated_cards.quote: Chronic sinusitis can cause ongoing inflammation, which can lead to fatigue, joint pain, and systemic symptoms.
